title: PageTranscript
description: Pass-2 vision transcription of one split booklet page. Verbatim block-model: the transcript records the page as printed (typos included); typing and normalization happen at extraction, never here.

printed_page_number.description: The page number as PRINTED on the page, verbatim (usually a bare numeral). null when no page number is printed (covers, title leaves, blanks). Observed independently — the transcriber is never shown the arithmetic claim.

type.description: figure = illustration/diagram (described in text, not omitted); footnote = asterisked notes below tables; running_head = repeated header/footer furniture other than the page number.

text.description: Verbatim text for heading/paragraph/footnote/running_head; a concise visual description for figure; null for table/list.

level.description: Heading level (1 = page-top section head); null for non-headings.

underlined.description: true when the heading/label is underlined in print; null when not applicable.

items.description: List items, verbatim, for type=list; null otherwise.

columns.description: Table column headers, verbatim (multi-line headers joined with newline); null for non-tables.

rows.description: Table body cells as VERBATIM STRINGS exactly as printed ('30 - 300', '1-1/1/2', '--'); empty string for empty cells; one array per printed row; null for non-tables.

continues_previous_page.description: true when this block visibly continues a block from the previous page (mid-sentence start, table carried over).

continues_next_page.description: true when this block visibly continues onto the next page.

transcriber_note.description: Sparse, factual observation about the PAGE (smudge, stamp, handwriting, damaged glyph). Never commentary on the content.

uncertain_tokens.description: Every token the transcriber is not certain of, with its best reading in place in the block and the doubt recorded here.

reason.description: Why it is uncertain (broken type, smudge, ambiguous glyph).
